推荐场景: 国际团队讨论｜修复跨文化误会
60秒任务: 「跨文化误会」：B2项目综合决策；A=听懂潜台词并稳住关系；B=误判立场/过度直接翻车。
目标功能: B2综合听力｜隐含态度｜复杂信息｜观点结构｜决策行动
场景族: 办公室｜会议室｜远程会议｜走廊对话｜协作工具界面
推荐掌握的高价值、高频、可复用句型、短语、习语、固定搭配 池:
We may be interpreting the same message through different norms.（文化框架差异）
Before we assume bad intent, let’s check the context.（避免误判）
The impact was uncomfortable, even if the intention was neutral.（区分影响与意图）
This may be a style difference, not a personal attack.（降级冲突）
Could you explain how that sounded from your side?（询问对方视角）
I can see why the wording felt too direct.（承认感受）
Let’s clarify expectations before the next meeting.（预防复发）
We should repair the trust first.（先修复关系）
Then we can discuss the practical issue.（再处理事务）
A short apology may help reset the conversation.（修复策略）
I don’t think anyone wanted to embarrass anyone.（降低归责）
Let’s agree on a more comfortable communication style.（建立共同方式）
The problem escalated because the message was read differently.（解释升级原因）
What would a respectful response look like here?（选择回应）
We need a solution that protects both clarity and respect.（平衡目标）
Let’s document the agreement so expectations are shared.（书面闭环）
推荐掌握的核心词汇、词组池:
Nouns: norm, interpretation, wording, intention, impact, trust
Verbs: interpret, assume, clarify, repair, embarrass, escalate
Adjectives: neutral, direct, respectful, uncomfortable, shared, practical
Work contexts: email, meeting, feedback, deadline, team chat, client call
Chunks: different norms, bad intent, style difference, repair trust, reset the conversation, clarity and respect
